content: Tech Operator needs changing and I'm going to tell you why!

referenced_message.author: xgriff_
referenced_message.content:
Removing hypershot no joke will make myself as well as many others leave this game for good… I did not spend MONTHS building my character and class just for them to randomly decide to remove the ONLY mechanic in a balanced class that makes it viable. 
If hypershot gets removed, this is what’s going no to happen. 
Nobody is going to team with any aegis because they can’t heal like a medic, so they won’t swap that spot out, they can’t tank because THEYRE AN ENGINEERING CLASS, and they can’t dps near as well as a VG, so the class effectively dies. Nobody and I mean NOBODY is taking an aegis into an elite for a 30% damage buff every 40 seconds… that would be utterly ignorant. 
Hypershot removal = massive loss in player base. Simple as that.. because not only are all the aegis players gonna say **** it, but other players who see that the devs just randomly destroy classes are going to be afraid they’re wasting their time because it could also happen to them.

Bc hypershot scales off engineering to an extent and skill critical damage.. but if you’re not over 50% crit chance ur gonna struggle hitting the big numbers

There are 3 minimum stat thresholds you should be aiming for to watch your damage skyrocket. 

Base 2K engineering (attribute page not inventory page) 

200% skill critical damage 

60% skill critical chance (VERY IMPORTANT TO BE OVER 50%) 

For hypershot… that’s basically it. You want obviously hazardous area for your defender drone chip, and a weapon that has a 20% skill critical damage augment, a skill critical damage roll, with the talents “torrential downpour” and “multitasking”…
Because you’re asking for something that NO other class has… there are no exact numbers to ANYTHING in the game, the other divisions were the same way it was all community mapped
How much are your hyper shots hitting for on non shielded enemies

For real? I'm not being sarcastic but I have a build with 120+ base skill intensity and I barely notice any difference against a build with ~30. Even the drone stats didn't move.

Is there a breaking point for skill intensity?

That's why drone HP will or should have better scaling with Skill Intensity together with and adjusted base HP. I don't even know if Drones have armor and dmg reduction.  

I don't know about you but I don't have an issue with my drones lasting longer in legendary. I don't even have a problem with them being popped up a molly. The real problem starts is with pvp where even the slightest collateral damage from players pops them up

referenced_message.author: kolumbinekid
referenced_message.content:
Simple buff to Striker drones:

Slight increase in Base Damage, HP and Movement Speed.

Add Skill Intensity scaling to Base Damage and HP

Decrease attack interval for a short burst during Drone Lock to help with the initial burst damage. Offensive TechOps is the only class without a burst damage. They can't even camp doors.

Increase the base attack range of striker drones and flight height so they don't block player projectiles resulting into DPS loss.

Teamfight skill mod for Aegis Op is not working. It doesn't apply the extra damage or buff based on engineering. Also, it is unclear how the other skill mods work. Please revamp the wording to be more clear.

Striker drones need a lot of love. 

Their base movement speed when in combat is laughable, even a regular agent sprinting with no movement speed increases can outrun them. Please increase their flight speed.

Also their durability is equal to that of styrofoam. Even with all health mods and increments to health for skills through gear sets, they get mowed down way too fast.
Can you give the tech operator the car that shocks players and the deployable turret that shoots bullets too, like the engineers we fight in instances? Or a 3rd specialization for this?

Offensive operator does not scale when doing pve  or pvp content. 

In pve armor type of drone is based on weapon and stats at deployment for a single target so if it dies you have the wrong armor type entirely and cant be replaced until you cycle the drones. 

In  PvP drones can be out ran and are useless. 

Requires a lot of management of targets and ramping and by the time you are able to get to ramp everything is dead or the targeting for armor is invalidated causing sub par dps for a class specializing in single target dps. 

Any fire or explosion causes the drones to be nuked and weapon mods to allow for healing of drones or increase health does not prevent all drones to be engulfed by flames chunking 1/3 of its health and dying after 2-3 seconds regardless of trying to heal the drones or increasing drone health. 

Drone attack frequency is not explained in the game and at times will sit and hover around a enemy not attacking at all like there is a cooldown for fire 

Drones are currently SNAPSHOTED at deployment and cooldown reduction OS like strategic assistance/ weapon mods that increase cooldown reduction need to be perfectly timed before used and are impossible to upkeep since things die too quickly or take to long to die to meet requirement to even use mods and talents and take away from building a useable class. 

Suggested fix:
drone damage selector to select the type of damage drones are doing 

Done frequency of attack be attached to an attribute like skill intensity to be able to increase rate of fire/ frequency 

In PvP, drones should apply a slow to be usable in the dz or conflict 

Give drones % fire resistance tied something like engineer to negate how much dmg is being done. It looks like the dmg taken to drone is the same to a person getting hit with fire or a grenade

Make drones dynamic buffs to allow for OS like strategic assistance to be usable.This seems hard) an alternative would be to store the buff on the next activation of drone
Also the explosive damage from barrels wipes striker drones, they are way too weak
Yes please make offensive operations drones have more health. As it stands they are useless in high level content or PvP
Damage drones are useless in elites. They die too quick and need a big health buff

Fix it that videos in missions despawn the drones, this is the first annoying part due to the high cooldowns.

the second thing is, improve it somehow, that drones are living longer. also aggro management is sometimes very strange, i was not able to detect a pattern why i got attacked, and when the drones. felt like rng.

i only realized, that all drones are gone. and then i had to ait and wait.
You could just shoot the defender drone down quite easily while they are opening a box, then all of that goes away instantly.

referenced_message.author: el_gato.123456
referenced_message.content: Nerf Extra health and Remove CC Immunity on Aegis. No more Extract robbers and Chest goblins

content: Gtfo with this nonsense the class is already handicapped with teamfight skill chip not working. They can't really build to be immortal and have damage at the same time, either you have damage or you hit like a mosquito but your durable

Can we disable friendly fire blocking from Aegis drones? Can't tell you how often an ally Aegis goes anywhere near my field of fire and their massive hitbox from a stack of mender drones and defender drone blocks my ability to damage anything.
Not about changes, BUT - just let us know clearly HOW Hyper-shot works and scales, so we can make propper builds
And nerfing the extra health will definitely damage aegis effectiveness on elites in a major way that I don’t think is ideal. Just stopping chest stealing I think is a good change
The defender doesn’t give cc immunity they just need to make any instance of damage knock you off the chest. As of now shocks, pummeling, etc will knock you off the chest
